title: Hosts and Hostesses, Restaurant, Lounge, and Coffee Shop
description: Welcome patrons, seat them at tables or in lounge, and help ensure quality of facilities and service.

tasks.text: Provide guests with menus.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Greet guests and seat them at tables or in waiting areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain contact with kitchen staff, management, serving staff, and customers to ensure that dining details are handled properly and customers' concerns are addressed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assign patrons to tables suitable for their needs and according to rotation so that servers receive an appropriate number of seatings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Speak with patrons to ensure satisfaction with food and service, to respond to complaints, or to make conversation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect dining and serving areas to ensure cleanliness and proper setup.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Supervise and coordinate activities of dining room staff to ensure that patrons receive prompt and courteous service.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Answer telephone calls and respond to inquiries or transfer calls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist other restaurant workers by serving food and beverages, or by bussing tables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect restrooms for cleanliness and availability of supplies, and clean restrooms when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Take and prepare to-go orders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform patrons of establishment specialties and features.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Receive and record patrons' dining reservations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Operate cash registers to accept payments for food and beverages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct patrons to coatrooms and waiting areas, such as lounges.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare cash receipts after establishments close, and make bank deposits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Order or requisition supplies and equipment for tables and serving stations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Hire, train, and supervise food and beverage service staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with other staff to help plan establishments' menus.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform marketing and advertising services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
